task: Advanced high-value task: Hybrid Ferry Energy Leg High-Complexity Review Packet. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for hybrid ferry energy leg. Embedded packet: Records: R1 maneuver_kWh=77 charger_power_kW=115 charge_window_h=8; R2 maneuver_kWh=86 charger_power_kW=111 charge_window_h=11; R3 maneuver_kWh=72 charger_power_kW=126 charge_window_h=7. Remediation options: O1 changes maneuver_kWh by -12% cost=95000; O2 changes charger_power_kW by -18% cost=108200; O3 changes charge_window_h by -25% cost=65800; max_budget=134400. Rules and constraints: daily energy must fit usable battery plus charging with 20% reserve; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver hybrid_ferry_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
